failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result showing 13 available Mechanical Keyboard options and produced an incorrect answer of 20 with a fabricated record reference.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the number of available Mechanical Keyboard options. The required tool call was made correctly, and the tool returned count=13 with 13 available items. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming there are 20 options and cited record 0000000000. This contradicts the relevant tool output and uses an unsupported record ID. The failure was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the incorrect answer instead of correcting it.
